name: ACTUATE THERAPEUTICS, INC.
summary: PART I . Overview Class-Leading GSK-3 Inhibitor We are a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing therapies for the treatment of high impact, difficult to treat cancers through the inhibition of glycogen synthase kinase-3 (GSK-3). We are developing elraglusib, an ATP-competitive small molecule that is designed to enter cancer cells and block the function of the enzyme glycogen synthase kinase-3 beta (GSK-3), a master regulator of complex biological signaling cascades, inclu...
